name: deploy-release
description: SDLC deploy phase: trigger the registered DeploymentAdapter to promote a release to a named environment. Always gated through the approval gate (config:update rule). Stub adapter dry-runs; ShellDeploymentAdapter runs a real CI/CD trigger if configured at knowledge/personal/deployments/<project>.json.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.
